articles.title: Trump Purrs Over Dinner At Palace Of Versailles: 'The Real Deal'
articles.content: Keep independent journalism alive. “I’m a fan of beautiful places,” Trump said. And Versailles is not a gold leaf. Versailles is the real deal. And I said, I’d like to do it.”. Trump’s long been vocal about his affinity for gold and previously described modeling one...

articles.title: 'They're a very difficult team to support': PM Wong says he roots for Tottenham Hotspur
articles.content: Prime Minister Lawrence Wong has revealed that he is a lifelong Tottenham Hotspur supporter. He added: "They try, try, try but very little success.". Recalling some of Spurs' stars from his younger days, PM Wong named Garth Crooks, Glenn Hoddle and Osvaldo (Ossie) Ardiles

articles.title: Thundery showers expected on most days for rest of June
articles.content: Localised short-duration thundery showers are expected over parts of the island during the late morning and afternoon on most days
